openapi: 3.0.0

info:
  version: "1.1"
  title: PFF Bearer Auth
  description: API for obtaining a Bearer auth token
  contact:
    name: PFF Support
    email: support@profootballfocus.com
    url: "http://www.profootballfocus.com"
  license:
    name: "Copyright 2019 Pro Football Focus - All rights reserved"
    url: "https://www.profootballfocus.com"

externalDocs:
  description: PFF API User Guide
  url: https://api.profootballfocus.com/doc/index.html

servers:
  - description: PFF Production
    url: 'https://api.profootballfocus.com/auth'

security:
  - api-key: []

paths:
  /login:
    post:
      summary: Login with API key
      description: |
        Given a valid API key in the `x-api-key` header, returns a JWT token
        that can be used as the bearer token in all other API requests
      parameters:
        - name: x-api-key
          in: header
          description: API key
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A JSON object containing the JWT token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  jwt:
                    type: string
              example:
                jwt: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..zNKxgWt-RU9XbCfSE7yE_8DTmyOpzWl1Ct9VHJJZdzzMlKuM22P0DX4TEKQ1lQhNq7ls4-SrvZ3XYnCX3ldfjw"

        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/UnauthorizedError'

components:

  securitySchemes:
    api-key:
      type: apiKey
      name: x-api-key
      in: header

  responses:
    UnauthorizedError:
      description: API key is missing or invalid
